# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs update
- [ ] Refactor/maintenance

## Validation

- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun run format:check`
- [ ] `bun run build`

## Screenshots (if UI change)

Add before/after screenshots or a short video.

## Checklist

- [ ] I linked related issue(s), if any.
- [ ] I kept this PR focused and avoided unrelated edits.
- [ ] I updated docs/content when behavior changed.
- [ ] I confirmed i18n impact for new user-facing text.
